name: Monday content plan
prompt: Plan the week: 3 LinkedIn posts (Caner profile) + 1 blog (purposefulprofits.co) + 1 case study draft (sourced from any PP-managed brand wins). Save plan to outputs/content-plan-{date}.md and Notion Content Calendar.

name: Tuesday LinkedIn post
prompt: Author 1 LinkedIn post via /linkedin-post skill. Operator voice. Lead with proof. No engagement bait.

name: Thursday LinkedIn post
prompt: Author 1 LinkedIn post. Different theme from Tuesday.

name: Wednesday blog draft
prompt: Author 1 blog post for purposefulprofits.co via /blog-post skill. Draft only. Submit to Caner for live publish.

name: Friday case study
prompt: One per fortnight: pick a documented win from any client workspace (read shared-ledger). Anonymise per privacy policy. Draft case study. Save to outputs/case-studies/.

name: Sunday content recap
prompt: Drafts authored, posts published, LinkedIn impressions/engagement deltas. Append to weekly rollup.
